title: DID-Anchored Verifiable Credentials with On-Chain Revocation for Social Media Identity Management
description: Reference implementation of a W3C-standards-aligned decentralised identity and verifiable credential system with controller-enforced on-chain revocation. Includes an Ethereum Solidity DID registry (DID lifecycle + nested revocation mapping), a Node.js credential service (eddsa-jcs-2022 Data Integrity signing with Ed25519 Multikey encoding), an eight-step verification pipeline, and a 47-test suite. On-chain gas is deterministic and reproducible (createDID 346,878 gas; revokeCredential 171,188 gas), verified on both a local Hardhat EVM and the public Ethereum Sepolia testnet.
